id.description: Unique identifier for the logical object that instance of this type represents.

name.description: The name of the component. Optional field for informational purposes only.

dataSpec.description:
The data settings for this component.

@uiSdlDesignerCustomRenderer(rendererType='')

disableDataRequestOnFirstRender.description: Disable if you want to avoid sending any and all requests for this component on first render.

triggersRegistered.description: Whether the effect triggers and epics have been registered

wrapWithMetadataId.description: Whether to wrap the component with a div which has a class name of its metdata id. Useful for targeting with css.
